case_title: JOE BRENNER ET AL VS. DENNIS DUDEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BRENNER, JOE SHAFFER, ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT DUDEN, DENNIS ARELLANO, ANITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 37.50 SERVED JUL-09-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARELLANO, ANITA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS JOE BRENNER & ELLEN SHAFFER AND DEFENDANTS DENNIS DUDEN & ANITA ARELLANO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED JUL-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUDEN, DENNIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-26-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS JOE BRENNER & ELLEN SHAFFER AND DEFENDANTS DENNIS DUDEN & ANITA ARELLANO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. CASE WAS CALLED BUT DUE TO TIME CONSTRAINTS, THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRENNER, JOE SHAFFER, ELLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUDEN, DENNIS ARELLANO, ANITA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
